### sudo du -h -d1 /var/log 2>/dev/null | sort -h
4.0K	/var/log/dist-upgrade
4.0K	/var/log/private
16K	/var/log/fate-bot
284K	/var/log/apt
376K	/var/log/unattended-upgrades
1.2M	/var/log/apache2
4.7M	/var/log/nginx
1.8G	/var/log/journal
2.4G	/var/log

### sudo find /var/log -type f -size +50M -printf '%s %p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -n

541275264 /var/log/btmp

### sudo stat /var/log/btmp /var/log/wtmp /var/log/auth.log 2>/dev/null || true
  File: /var/log/btmp
  Size: 541275264 	Blocks: 1057312    IO Block: 4096   regular file
Device: 253,1	Inode: 14811       Links: 1
Access: (0660/-rw-rw----)  Uid: (    0/    root)   Gid: (   43/    utmp)
Access: 2025-04-03 11:14:30.582047272 +0000
